name: Southwest Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 chipotle chili; canned in adobo sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onion and garlic in oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven until onion is tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except quick crème fraîche and chopped red bell pepper; heat to boiling.
3. Boil for 2 minutes, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer until beans are tender, about 2 1/2 hours.
4. Pour 1/4 of the soup into a food processor work bowl fitted with the steel blade or into a blender container; cover and process until smooth. Repeat with remaining soup.
5. Serve with quick crème fraîche and chopped red bell pepper.
QUICK CREME FRAICHE:
Gradually stir whipping cream into sour cream. Cover and refrigerate up to 48 hours.
